name: Chilaquiles (Mexican Eggs)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup shredded Jack cheese or Cheddar
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the tortillas into strips that are 3/8 inch wide.
2. Fry over medium heat in oil or butter, stirring until crisp.
3. Add diced onions, chopped chilies, and salt to the fried tortillas.
4. Add eggs and mix well.
5. Cook, stirring until the eggs are partially set.
6. Sprinkle with shredded cheese.
7. Continue cooking, stirring until the eggs are cooked as desired.
8. Top each serving with salsa.
